texto: Childhood is the time and children's books are the place for powerful emotions, powerful language, powerful art... There is no room for cutesy books, dull books, or books that talk down. Children are not inferior. They may be small in stature but not in what they feel, think, listen, and see.
explicacao: Citação de Betsy Hearne sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Childhood is the time and children's books are the place for powerful emotions, powerful language…” articula reflexao, children, children-s-literature em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como children-s-literature e reading.
